name: Coles Group Limited.
analysis: COL's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$24.2200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$24.4100, stop A$22.6908, target A$29.5676 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
